SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT DETERMINES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT KNOLL, INC. IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF MAY RESET CASE FOR HEARING AND SERVE DEFENDANT AS REQUIRED. THE COURT RESERVES DECISION ON VENUE CHALLENGE UNTIL ALL DEFENDANTS HAVE BEEN SERVED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) NO APPEARNCES BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
